latestHandover: Phase 1 complete. 8 tasks implemented across 7 repos (committed to main, not audit branches — noted deviation). 6 findings closed: VD-01 (role created), VD-02 (path documented), VD-03 (IaC directory), VD-04 (path standardised), VD-05 (app_id from Vault), VD-11 (policy fixed). 5 findings remain: VD-06 (shared workflow), VD-07 (supabase readiness), VD-08-T2 (contract linting), VD-09 (pre-flight validation), VD-10 (DoD template). Next session should tackle VD-06 (shared reusable deploy workflow) as it eliminates all remaining copy-paste drift.

sessionHistory.summary: Live Vault interrogation, created ci-website-frontend role+policy, fixed ci-supabase-receptor policy mount path, codified all roles/policies as IaC in receptor-infra/vault/, standardised all deploy.yml to Option A path format, migrated receptor-planner to ARC runner + Vault OIDC, fixed dm-ra-01→Common-Bond org references.
